summary: A strong Portland ’77 show with highlights like The Music Never Stopped and Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World, captured on an excellent Miller‑transferred soundboard recording.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a tight, high‑energy performance – the first set’s peak being “The Music Never Stopped” and the second set delivering a sweet Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World stretch plus a solid Not Fade Away. Sound quality is praised as excellent thanks to a Miller transfer from the soundboard source. Overall it’s recommended for anyone exploring the fall‑77 run despite there being even stronger dates that season.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights a good musical performance and excellent recording quality; weight of show and soundboard source yields an overall four‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller transfer noted as crisp, clear and very listenable with no reported artifacts.

standout_songs: Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds to a high point with TMNS; second set flows nicely through Estimated Prophet into Eyes of the World and finishes strong with Not Fade Away, keeping momentum steady throughout.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil is praised for dropping "serious bombs" on bass during the second set.
